title: DuelsReloaded
description: An optimized version of the Duels plugin with additional features.
body:
> Contributors: rejomy

## Note:

This is a plugin fork of the popular Duels plugin. Even though this is a fork, the original add-ons are still supported and will work with this version of Duels.

## Features:
- Add [AntiRelog](https://github.com/regomy/AntiRelog) hook
- Add hunger check option and queue behavior update.
- Update regex for Latin and Cyrillic letter support

## Fixes:
- **Fix running Duels on MC 1.21+**
- **Fix /spectate command**
- Prevent throwing ender pearl at the start
- Fix potions hidden when prevented at start
- Duel kit names were not visible
- Players are now instantly teleported into match
- Fix compatibility with FlamePearl & prevent dying after victory with ender pearl
- Fixed inventory loss after tie with own equipment
- Fix CombatLogX Hook
